Settings.Label: DirectX 11 Upscaler
Settings.Tooltip: Select upscaler for DX11 games. Default: fsr22

Settings.Label: DirectX 12 Upscaler
Settings.Tooltip: Select upscaler for DX12 games. Default: xess

Settings.Label: Vulkan Upscaler
Settings.Tooltip: Select upscaler for Vulkan games. Default: fsr22

Settings.Label: Enable Overlay Menu
Settings.Tooltip: Enable in-game overlay menu

Settings.Label: Show FPS Counter
Settings.Tooltip: Display FPS counter in overlay

Settings.Label: Menu Shortcut Key
Settings.Tooltip: Press to set a key. Delete=Disabled, Esc=Cancel. Stored as hex virtual key code.

Settings.Label: FPS Overlay Type
Settings.Tooltip: FPS display style. 0=Just FPS | 1=Simple | 2=Detailed | 3=Detailed + Graph | 4=Full | 5=Full + Graph | 6=Reflex timings

Settings.Label: Menu Scale
Settings.Tooltip: In-game ImGui menu scale. 0.5 to 2.0

Settings.Label: FPS Overlay Scale
Settings.Tooltip: In-game FPS overlay scale. 0.5 to 2.0

Settings.Label: Extended Scaling Limits
Settings.Tooltip: Extends Scaling Ratio limits to 0.1 - 6.0

Settings.Label: Use High Quality Font
Settings.Tooltip: Use High Quality Font for Menu. Might use more VRAM

Settings.Label: Disable Startup Splash
Settings.Tooltip: Disables Startup Splash message

Settings.Label: FPS Overlay Position
Settings.Tooltip: FPS overlay position. 0=Top Left | 1=Top Right | 2=Bottom Left | 3=Bottom Right

Settings.Label: FPS Overlay Shortcut Key
Settings.Tooltip: Shortcut key for FPS overlay. Stored as hex virtual key code.

Settings.Label: FPS Cycle Shortcut Key
Settings.Tooltip: Shortcut key for FPS overlay type cycle. Stored as hex virtual key code.

Settings.Label: FPS Overlay Horizontal
Settings.Tooltip: Enables Horizontal FPS overlay layout

Settings.Label: FPS Overlay Alpha
Settings.Tooltip: FPS Overlay background alpha. 0.0 to 1.0

Settings.Label: FG Toggle Shortcut Key
Settings.Tooltip: Shortcut key for Frame Generation enabled/disabled. Stored as hex virtual key code.

Settings.Label: Custom Font Path
Settings.Tooltip: Path to a font to be used as HQ Font, requires UseHQFont=true

Settings.Label: Enable Frame Generation
Settings.Tooltip: Enables Frame Generation. Default: false

Settings.Label: FG Input Source
Settings.Tooltip: Selected FG Input/Source. Default: nofg

Settings.Label: FG Output
Settings.Tooltip: Selected FG Output. Default: nofg

Settings.Label: Frametime Source
Settings.Tooltip: 0: Input (DLSSG/FSRFG/OptiFG) | 1: Present calls | 2: Zero (Only for XeFG)

Settings.Label: FG Debug View
Settings.Tooltip: Enables Frame Generation Debug View

Settings.Label: Draw UI Over FG
Settings.Tooltip: Draw UI over FG, requires Hudless

Settings.Label: UI Premultiplied Alpha
Settings.Tooltip: Sets the type of a provided UI texture, with DrawUIOverFG + FSR FG it will change how the UI looks

Settings.Label: Control Hudless
Settings.Tooltip: Control Hudless feature

Settings.Label: Control UI texture
Settings.Tooltip: Control a UI texture, even if FG source provides one

Settings.Label: Skip reset
Settings.Tooltip: Ignores Reset signals coming from FG inputs

Settings.Label: Velocity valid now
Settings.Tooltip: Always tag Velocity as ValidNow

Settings.Label: Hudless valid now
Settings.Tooltip: Always tag Hudless as ValidNow

Settings.Label: Only accept first hudless
Settings.Tooltip: If source tags more than one hudless only use first one

Settings.Label: Preserve swap chain
Settings.Tooltip: Preserve and prevent releasing FG swapchain

Settings.Label: Skip resize buffers
Settings.Tooltip: Skip ResizeBuffers call to swapchain

Settings.Label: Modify buffer state
Settings.Tooltip: Normally after ResizeBuffers call swapchain buffers

Settings.Label: Modify SC index
Settings.Tooltip: Normally after ResizeBuffers call swapchain current index

Settings.Label: Plugins Path
Settings.Tooltip: Path that will be searched for same filename plugins (dxgi.dll, winmm.dll, etc.). Default is .\plugins

Settings.Label: Load ASI Plugins
Settings.Tooltip: Lets OptiScaler load *.asi files in plugins folder

Settings.Label: Load SpecialK
Settings.Tooltip: Loads SpecialK64.dll from game's exe folder. Please create an empty SpecialK.dxgi file next to SpecialK64.dll to set SpecialK's working mode. BECAUSE OF STABILITY ISSUES, WILL NOT BE LOADED WHEN OPTIFG IS ENABLED

Settings.Label: Load ReShade
Settings.Tooltip: Loads Reshade64.dll from game's exe folder. Rename Reshade dll to ReShade64.dll, put next to OptiScaler and set to true

Settings.Label: Log to File
Settings.Tooltip: Enable file logging

Settings.Label: Log to Console
Settings.Tooltip: Enable console logging

Settings.Label: Log Level
Settings.Tooltip: 0=Trace, 1=Debug, 2=Info, 3=Warning, 4=Error

Settings.Label: Log File Path
Settings.Tooltip: Log file path. Default (auto) is OptiScaler.log in same folder

Settings.Label: Log to NVNGX API
Settings.Tooltip: Log to NVNGX API

Settings.Label: Log to Debug Output
Settings.Tooltip: Log to Debug output

Settings.Label: Open Console Window
Settings.Tooltip: Open console window for logs

Settings.Label: Single Log File
Settings.Tooltip: When set to false creates a new log file for every OptiScaler session

Settings.Label: Async Logging
Settings.Tooltip: Enables Async logging

Settings.Label: Async Logging Threads
Settings.Tooltip: Async logging threads (1-8)

Settings.Label: Debug Tear Lines
Settings.Tooltip: Enables FSR3.1 Frame Generation Tear Lines

Settings.Label: Debug Reset Lines
Settings.Tooltip: Enables FSR3.1 Frame Generation interpolation skip lines

Settings.Label: Debug Pacing Lines
Settings.Tooltip: Enables FSR3.1 Frame Generation pacing lines

Settings.Label: Allow Async
Settings.Tooltip: Enables Async FSR3.1 Frame Generation

Settings.Label: Use Mutex for Swapchain
Settings.Tooltip: Enables usage of mutex for FG swapchain present calls. Disabling it might improve performance in cost of stability

Settings.Label: Frame Pace Tuning
Settings.Tooltip: Enables custom Frame Pace Tuning parameters

Settings.Label: Safety Margin (ms)
Settings.Tooltip: Sets safety margin. Default (auto) is 0.01

Settings.Label: Variance Factor
Settings.Tooltip: Sets variance factor (0.0 - 1.0). Default (auto) is 0.3

Settings.Label: Hybrid Spin
Settings.Tooltip: Allows pacing spinlock to sleep, should reduce CPU usage. Might cause slow ramp up of FPS

Settings.Label: Hybrid Spin Time
Settings.Tooltip: How long to spin if FPTHybridSpin is true. Measured in timer resolution units. Default (auto) is 2

Settings.Label: Wait For Single Object
Settings.Tooltip: Allows WaitForSingleObject instead of spinning for fence value

Settings.Label: Enable Watermark
Settings.Tooltip: Enable FSR-FG Redstone Watermark

Settings.Label: Ignore Init Checks
Settings.Tooltip: Skips pre ini checks for XeFG. Might cause bad IQ or crashes!

Settings.Label: Interpolation Count
Settings.Tooltip: Sets interpolated frame count (MFG). 1 = 2X | 2 = 3X | 3 = 4X

Settings.Label: Depth Inverted
Settings.Tooltip: XeFG DepthInverted flag

Settings.Label: UI Composition
Settings.Tooltip: Disable UI interpolation. Only works when hudless is provided

Settings.Label: Jittered MV
Settings.Tooltip: XeFG JitteredMV flag

Settings.Label: High Res MV
Settings.Tooltip: XeFG HighResMV flag

Settings.Label: Debug View
Settings.Tooltip: Enables XeFG debug squares

Settings.Label: Force Borderless
Settings.Tooltip: Forces Borderless mode instead of Exclusive Fullscreen. It might cause stability issues on mode changes or IQ issues when exclusive fullscreen mode is smaller than display resolution

Settings.Label: HUD Fix
Settings.Tooltip: Enables HUD fix FSR3.1 Frame Generation. Might cause crashes, specially with Async

Settings.Label: HUD Limit
Settings.Tooltip: Delays HUDless image capture. Might cause crashes, specially if set too high!

Settings.Label: HUD Fix Extended
Settings.Tooltip: Extended HUDless checks for more image formats. Might cause crash and slowdowns

Settings.Label: Disable RTV
Settings.Tooltip: Do not use CreateRenderTargetView for resource tracking

Settings.Label: Disable SRV
Settings.Tooltip: Do not use CreateShaderResourceView for resource tracking

Settings.Label: Disable UAV
Settings.Tooltip: Do not use CreateUnorderedAccessView for resource tracking

Settings.Label: Disable OM
Settings.Tooltip: Do not use OMSetRenderTargets for resource tracking

Settings.Label: Disable SCR
Settings.Tooltip: Do not use SetComputeRootDescriptorTable for resource tracking

Settings.Label: Disable SGR
Settings.Tooltip: Do not use SetGraphicsRootDescriptorTable for resource tracking

Settings.Label: Disable DI
Settings.Tooltip: Do not use DrawInstanced for resource tracking

Settings.Label: Disable DII
Settings.Tooltip: Do not use DrawIndexedInstanced for resource tracking

Settings.Label: Disable Dispatch
Settings.Tooltip: Do not use Dispatch for resource tracking

Settings.Label: Don't Use Swapchain Buffers
Settings.Tooltip: Prevent swapchain buffers to be used as Hudless. Might help fixing overlay issues but also might reduce compatibility

Settings.Label: Relaxed Resolution Check
Settings.Tooltip: Relax resolution checks for Hudless by 32 pixels. Helps games which use black borders for some resolutions and screen ratios (e.g. Witcher 3)

Settings.Label: HUD Fix Immediate
Settings.Tooltip: Enables capturing of resources before shader execution. Increase hudless capture chances but might cause capturing of unnecessary resources

Settings.Label: Always Track Heaps
Settings.Tooltip: Resource tracking is always enabled regardless of Hudfix setting. Might cause performance issues but disabling might cause stability issues

Settings.Label: Use Shards
Settings.Tooltip: Instead of single mutex use shards for tracking resources. Might improve performance on heavy multithreaded games

Settings.Label: Resource Blocking
Settings.Tooltip: Block rarely used resources from using as hudless to prevent flickers and other issues

Settings.Label: Make Depth Copy
Settings.Tooltip: Makes a copy of Depth to be used with Hudfix FG call. Setting it false most probably cause occasional garbling

Settings.Label: Enable Depth Scale
Settings.Tooltip: Scale depth buffer according to DepthScaleMax value. Fixes broken depth buffer info for DLSS-D + UE

Settings.Label: Depth Scale Max
Settings.Tooltip: Scale value for EnableDepthScale. Depth value will be divided to this value

Settings.Label: Make MV Copy
Settings.Tooltip: Makes a copy of motion vectors to be used with Hudfix FG call. Setting it false most probably cause occasional garbling

Settings.Label: Resource Flip
Settings.Tooltip: Flip Depth & Velocity textures. This should fix OptiFG issues with Unity games

Settings.Label: Resource Flip Offset
Settings.Tooltip: Flip Depth & Velocity textures according to interpolation area. This should fix OptiFG issues with Unity games

Settings.Label: Always Capture FSRFG Swapchain
Settings.Tooltip: Always captures and swaps FSR-FG 3.1 swapchain with selected output. This should fix double present call issue with games create but not use FSR-FG swapchain (Silent Hill f)

Settings.Label: Enable DLSS Inputs
Settings.Tooltip: OptiScaler will hook (nvngx.dll) and use Dlss Inputs

Settings.Label: Enable XeSS Inputs
Settings.Tooltip: OptiScaler will hook (libxess.dll) and use XeSS Inputs

Settings.Label: Enable FSR2 Inputs
Settings.Tooltip: OptiScaler will hook Fsr2 Inputs

Settings.Label: Use FSR2 DX11 Inputs
Settings.Tooltip: OptiScaler will hook Fsr2 Dx11 Inputs instead of Dx12 one

Settings.Label: Use FSR2 Vulkan Inputs
Settings.Tooltip: OptiScaler will hook Fsr2 Vulkan Inputs instead of Dx11 & Dx12 ones

Settings.Label: Use FSR2 Inputs
Settings.Tooltip: OptiScaler will use Fsr2 Inputs

Settings.Label: FSR2 Pattern
Settings.Tooltip: Try to find FSR2 methods with pattern matching. Will slow down the loading of the game

Settings.Label: Enable FSR3 Inputs
Settings.Tooltip: OptiScaler will hook Fsr3 Inputs

Settings.Label: Use FSR3 Inputs
Settings.Tooltip: OptiScaler will use Fsr3 Inputs

Settings.Label: FSR3 Pattern
Settings.Tooltip: Try to find FSR3 methods with pattern matching. Will slow down the loading of the game

Settings.Label: Enable FFX Inputs
Settings.Tooltip: OptiScaler will hook FidelityFX (amd_fidelityfx_dx12.dll) API Inputs

Settings.Label: Use FFX Inputs
Settings.Tooltip: OptiScaler will use FidelityFX API Inputs

Settings.Label: Enable Hot Swapping
Settings.Tooltip: Enables hot swapping between games FSR3.1 upscaler and OptiScaler's selected upscaler

Settings.Label: Skip Config for Hudless
Settings.Tooltip: Do not use Hudless set at ffxConfig

Settings.Label: Skip Dispatch for Hudless
Settings.Tooltip: Do not use Hudless set at ffxDispatch

Settings.Label: Framerate Limit
Settings.Tooltip: Frame rate limit that uses Reflex, therefore the game has to support Reflex and have it enabled. AMD users can use Fakenvapi to get this feature working. Default (auto) is 0.0 (disabled)

Settings.Label: Build Pipelines
Settings.Tooltip: Building pipeline for XeSS before init

Settings.Label: Create Heaps
Settings.Tooltip: Creating heap objects for XeSS before init

Settings.Label: Network Model
Settings.Tooltip: Select XeSS network model. Currently doesn't seem to do anything. 0 = KPSS | 1 = Splat | 2 = Model 3 | 3 = Model 4 | 4 = Model 5 | 5 = Model 6

Settings.Label: Library Path
Settings.Tooltip: Override path of libxess.dll. Example - D:\Downloads\OptiScaler\libxess.dll. Default (auto) is same folder as mod dll

Settings.Label: DX11 Library Path
Settings.Tooltip: Override path of libxess_dx11.dll. Example - D:\Downloads\OptiScaler\libxess_dx11.dll. Default (auto) is same folder as mod dll

Settings.Label: Vertical FOV
Settings.Tooltip: Sets camera vertical FOV value for FSR and FSR FG. 0.0 to 180.0. Default (auto) is 60.0

Settings.Label: Horizontal FOV
Settings.Tooltip: If Vertical FOV is not defined will be used to calculate Vertical FOV. 0.0 to 180.0. Default (auto) is off

Settings.Label: Camera Near
Settings.Tooltip: Sets camera near value for FSR and FSR FG. 0.0 to max float value. Default (auto) is 0.1

Settings.Label: Camera Far
Settings.Tooltip: Sets camera far value for FSR and FSR FG. 0.0 to max float value. Default (auto) is 10000.0

Settings.Label: Use FSR Input Values
Settings.Tooltip: Enables usage of camera values (near, far, FOV) received from FSR2/3 or FFX inputs

Settings.Label: Debug View
Settings.Tooltip: Enables Debug View for FSR3.X upscaler

Settings.Label: Upscaler Index
Settings.Tooltip: Selects upscaler backend for FSR3.X/4. 0 = FSR 4.0.2 | 1 = FSR 3.1.5 | 2 = FSR 2.3.4. Default (auto) is 0 - FSR4 for RDNA4, FSR3 for the rest

Settings.Label: FG Index
Settings.Tooltip: Selects FG backend for FFX. 0 = FSR 4.0.0 | 1 = FSR 3.1.6. Default (auto) is 0 - FSR4 for RDNA4, FSR3 for the rest

Settings.Label: Velocity Factor
Settings.Tooltip: Sets Velocity Factor for FSR3.1.1 and above. Value of 0.0f can improve temporal stability of bright pixels. 0.0 to 1.0. Default (auto) is 1.0

Settings.Label: Reactive Scale
Settings.Tooltip: Sets Reactiveness Scale for FSR3.1.4 and above. Meant for development purpose to test if writing a larger value to reactive mask, reduces ghosting. 0.0 to infinite. Default (auto) is 1.0

Settings.Label: Shading Scale
Settings.Tooltip: Sets Shading Scale for FSR3.1.4 and above. Increasing this scales fsr3.1 computed shading change value at read to have higher reactiveness. 0.0 to infinite. Default (auto) is 1.0

Settings.Label: Acc Add Per Frame
Settings.Tooltip: Sets Accumulation added per frame for FSR3.1.4 and above. 0.0 to 1.0. Default (auto) is 0.333

Settings.Label: Min DisOcc Acc
Settings.Tooltip: Sets Minimum Disocclusion Accumulation for FSR3.1.4 and above. -1.0 to 1.0. Default (auto) is -0.333

Settings.Label: Use Reactive Mask for Transparency
Settings.Tooltip: Use raw DLSS reactive mask as transparency mask

Settings.Label: DLSS Reactive Mask Bias
Settings.Tooltip: Bias to apply DLSS reactive mask when using with FSR. Higher the value, more bias on new frame. 0.0 - 0.9. Default (auto) is 0.45

Settings.Label: FSR4 Update
Settings.Tooltip: Enables updating of FSR3.X to FSR4. Default (auto) depends on GPU - true for RDNA4

Settings.Label: FSR4 Model
Settings.Tooltip: Select FSR4 model to use. 0 = For FSR Native AA, 1 = Ultra Quality/Quality, 2 = Balanced, 3 = Performance, 4 = DRS, 5 = Ultra Performance. Default (auto) is game's default

Settings.Label: FSR4 Enable Debug View
Settings.Tooltip: Enable FSR4 Debug View visualization. Might consume more VRAM

Settings.Label: FSR4 Enable Watermark
Settings.Tooltip: Enable FSR4 Watermark

Settings.Label: FSR Non-Linear Color Space
Settings.Tooltip: Indicates input color resource uses Non-Linear color space. Might improve IQ of FSR4

Settings.Label: FSR Non-Linear sRGB
Settings.Tooltip: Indicates input color resource contains perceptual sRGB colors. Might improve IQ of FSR4

Settings.Label: FSR Non-Linear PQ
Settings.Tooltip: Indicates input color resource contains perceptual PQ colors. Might improve IQ of FSR4

Settings.Label: FSR Agility SDK Upgrade
Settings.Tooltip: Updates the DirectX 12 Agility SDK. Enabling the use of FSR4 on Windows 10 in older titles like Cyberpunk 2077. You MUST copy D3D12_OptiScaler folder next to game's exe!

Settings.Label: FFX DX12 Path
Settings.Tooltip: Override path of amd_fidelityfx_dx12.dll. Default (auto) is same folder as mod dll

Settings.Label: FFX Vulkan Path
Settings.Tooltip: Override path of amd_fidelityfx_vk.dll. Default (auto) is same folder as mod dll

Settings.Label: Enabled
Settings.Tooltip: Enables calls to original NVNGX

Settings.Label: Library Path
Settings.Tooltip: Override path of nvngx.dll / _nvngx.dll. Default (auto) is path defined in registry

Settings.Label: Feature Path
Settings.Tooltip: Path of streamline/nvngx_dlss.dll folder which will be used on initing nvngx api. Default (auto) is OptiScaler dll path

Settings.Label: NVNGX DLSS Path
Settings.Tooltip: Override path of nvngx_dlss.dll. Default (auto) means override disabled

Settings.Label: Render Preset Override
Settings.Tooltip: Set this to true to enable custom render preset overrides

Settings.Label: Render Preset For All
Settings.Tooltip: Render presets for quality settings. 0 = Default | 1 = A | 2 = B | 3 = C | 4 = D | 5 = E | 6 = F | 7 = G | 8 = H | 9 = I | 10 = J | 11 = K | 12 = L | 13 = M | 14 = N | 15 = O. Default (auto) is 0

Settings.Label: Render Preset DLAA
Settings.Tooltip: Render preset for DLAA quality setting

Settings.Label: Render Preset Ultra Quality
Settings.Tooltip: Render preset for Ultra Quality setting

Settings.Label: Render Preset Quality
Settings.Tooltip: Render preset for Quality setting

Settings.Label: Render Preset Balanced
Settings.Tooltip: Render preset for Balanced setting

Settings.Label: Render Preset Performance
Settings.Tooltip: Render preset for Performance setting

Settings.Label: Render Preset Ultra Performance
Settings.Tooltip: Render preset for Ultra Performance setting

Settings.Label: Use Generic App ID with DLSS
Settings.Tooltip: Use generic appid with NGX, fixes OptiScaler preset override not working with certain games

Settings.Label: Render Preset Override
Settings.Tooltip: Set this to true to enable custom render preset overrides

Settings.Label: Render Preset For All
Settings.Tooltip: Render presets for quality settings. 0 = Default | 1 = A | 2 = B | 3 = C | 4 = D | 5 = E. Default (auto) is 0

Settings.Label: Render Preset DLAA
Settings.Tooltip: Render preset for DLAA quality setting

Settings.Label: Render Preset Ultra Quality
Settings.Tooltip: Render preset for Ultra Quality setting

Settings.Label: Render Preset Quality
Settings.Tooltip: Render preset for Quality setting

Settings.Label: Render Preset Balanced
Settings.Tooltip: Render preset for Balanced setting

Settings.Label: Render Preset Performance
Settings.Tooltip: Render preset for Performance setting

Settings.Label: Render Preset Ultra Performance
Settings.Tooltip: Render preset for Ultra Performance setting

Settings.Label: Make Depth Copy
Settings.Tooltip: Fix broken visuals in some games (mostly non-UE) on AMD GPUs under Windows. Can cause stutters, so best to use only when necessary and mentioned

Settings.Label: Spoofed Vendor ID
Settings.Tooltip: VendorID to spoof. 0x10de = Nvidia | 0x8086 = Intel | 0x1002 = AMD. Default (auto) is 0x10de

Settings.Label: Spoofed Device ID
Settings.Tooltip: DeviceID to spoof. 0x2684 = 4090 | 0xE20B = B580 | 0x7550 9070 XT. Default (auto) is 0x2684 (4090)

Settings.Label: Target Vendor ID
Settings.Tooltip: Target VendorID to be spoofed. Default (auto) is all

Settings.Label: Target Device ID
Settings.Tooltip: Target DeviceID to be spoofed. Default (auto) is all

Settings.Label: Spoofed GPU Name
Settings.Tooltip: Spoofed GPU name. NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4090 | Intel(R) Arc(TM) B580 Graphics | AMD Radeon RX 9070 XT. Default (auto) is NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4090

Settings.Label: Streamline Spoofing
Settings.Tooltip: Enables GPU spoofing for Streamline, even if Dxgi spoofing is disabled for the rest of the game. Usually allows for using Fakenvapi without spoofing the whole game, and sometimes DLSS/DLSSG

Settings.Label: DXGI
Settings.Tooltip: Enables Nvidia GPU spoofing for DXGI (can be changed above to spoof other vendors). Default (auto) is true for AMD/Intel, false for Nvidia

Settings.Label: DXGI Factory Wrapping
Settings.Tooltip: Enables wrapping of DxgiFactory instead of hooking. Might cause issues or help Nvidia cards with other mods

Settings.Label: DXGI Blacklist
Settings.Tooltip: Skips DXGI GPU spoofing when caller method in the list. Be careful this will disable spoofing for rest of the calls, also does not work on Linux. Default (auto) is disabled

Settings.Label: DXGI VRAM
Settings.Tooltip: Spoof amount of VRAM for DXGI. Spoofed amount in GBs. Default (auto) is disabled

Settings.Label: Vulkan
Settings.Tooltip: Enables Nvidia GPU spoofing for Vulkan (can be changed above to spoof other vendors). Default (auto) is false

Settings.Label: Vulkan Extension Spoofing
Settings.Tooltip: Enables Nvidia extension spoofing for Vulkan. Default (auto) is false

Settings.Label: Vulkan VRAM
Settings.Tooltip: Spoof amount of VRAM for Vulkan. Spoofed amount in GBs. Default (auto) is disabled

Settings.Label: Spoof HAGS
Settings.Tooltip: Enables spoofing of Hardware Accelerated GPU Scheduling. Required for Nukem's mod, also lets RTX40xx series users use DLSSG without HAGS enabled. Default (auto) is false, unless DLSSG mod is enabled

Settings.Label: D3D Feature Level
Settings.Tooltip: Enables overriding of requested D3D feature level. Default (auto) is false

Settings.Label: UE Intel Atomics
Settings.Tooltip: Prevents DirectX12 not supported error on UE games with Intel cards when spoofing enabled. Default (auto) is false

Settings.Label: Registry
Settings.Tooltip: Spoofs Vendor ID, Device ID and Driver Version at registry level. Default (auto) is false

Settings.Label: Registry Driver
Settings.Tooltip: Driver version to be spoofed at registry. Default (auto) is 32.0.15.9155 (For Nvidia)

Settings.Label: User32
Settings.Tooltip: Spoofs Vendor ID, Device ID at User32 level. Default (auto) is false

Settings.Label: Override NvAPI DLL
Settings.Tooltip: Override loading of nvapi64.dll. Default (auto) is false for Nvidia, true for others

Settings.Label: Disable Flip Metering
Settings.Tooltip: Disable FlipMetering. Fix the thick frametime graph caused by Nvidia's Flip Metering when using NukemFG, needs Fakenvapi to work. Default (auto) is false for Nvidia, true for others

Settings.Label: NvAPI DLL Path
Settings.Tooltip: If nvapi override enabled and file path defined here, will try to load it from here, otherwise will check current folder for nvapi64.dll. Default (auto) is local folder

Settings.Label: Don't Use Fakenvapi for XeLL on Nvidia
Settings.Tooltip: Do not use fakenvapi for converting Reflex calls to XeLL calls on Nvidia GPUs. Default (auto) is false

Settings.Label: Use Delayed Init
Settings.Tooltip: Delay some operations during creation of D11wDx12 features to increase compatibility

Settings.Label: Don't Use NT Shared
Settings.Tooltip: Prefer using D3D11_RESOURCE_MISC_SHARED, which is lower level and a bit more performant and possibly less compatible

Settings.Label: Early Hooking
Settings.Tooltip: Early hooking of kernel methods. May cause compatibility issues!!!

Settings.Label: Hook Original NVNGX Only
Settings.Tooltip: Skip hooking of local nvngx files and only hook nvngx at registry. Needed for Uniscaler + FG

Settings.Label: Use NT DLL Hooks
Settings.Tooltip: Only hook ntdll.dll methods, skip kernel32.dll and kernelbase.dll hooks

Settings.Label: Override Sharpness
Settings.Tooltip: Override DLSS Sharpness parameter with fixed Sharpness value

Settings.Label: Sharpness
Settings.Tooltip: Strength of Sharpening, value range between 0.0 and 1.0 (while using upper limit is RCAS 1.3). Default (auto) is 0.3

Settings.Label: Enabled
Settings.Tooltip: Enable Output Scaling option for Dx12 and Dx11 with Dx12 backends

Settings.Label: Multiplier
Settings.Tooltip: Output Scaling ratio. 0.5 - 3.0. Default (auto) is 1.5

Settings.Label: Downscaler
Settings.Tooltip: Downscaler to use for Output Scaling. 0 = FSR1 | 1 = Bicubic | 2 = Catmull-Rom | 3 = Lanczos2 | 4 = Lanczos3 | 5 = Kaiser2 | 6 = Kaiser3 | 7 = MAGIC. Default (auto) is 0 (FSR1)

Settings.Label: Enabled
Settings.Tooltip: Enables RCAS sharpening

Settings.Label: Motion Sharpness Enabled
Settings.Tooltip: Enable Motion Sharpness

Settings.Label: Motion Sharpness
Settings.Tooltip: Sharpening will be added or removed according to motion length. value range between -1.3 and 1.3. Default (auto) is 0.4

Settings.Label: Motion Threshold
Settings.Tooltip: How much a pixel should move before Motion Sharpness applied. 0.0 - 100.0. Default (auto) is 0.0

Settings.Label: Motion Scale Limit
Settings.Tooltip: How much a pixel should move to reach maximum MotionSharpness value. Values between MotionThreshold and this value will use be used to scale sharpness value. 0.0 - 100.0. Default (auto) is 10.0

Settings.Label: Motion Sharpness Debug
Settings.Tooltip: Enable Debug Highlighting for Motion Sharpening. Reddish hue for added greenish for reduced sharpness

Settings.Label: Contrast Enabled
Settings.Tooltip: Enable Contrast based sharpening. Increases sharpness at high contrast areas

Settings.Label: Contrast
Settings.Tooltip: Contrast based sharpening value. Higher values increases sharpness at high contrast areas. High values might cause graphical GLITCHES when used with high sharpness values. 0.0 - 2.0. Default (auto) is 0.0

Settings.Label: Auto Exposure
Settings.Tooltip: Force add ENABLE_AUTOEXPOSURE to init flags. Some Unreal Engine games need this, fixes colors specially in dark areas. Default (auto) is DLSS value

Settings.Label: HDR
Settings.Tooltip: Force add HDR_INPUT_COLOR to init flags. Default (auto) is DLSS value

Settings.Label: Depth Inverted
Settings.Tooltip: Force add INVERTED_DEPTH to init flags. Default (auto) is DLSS value

Settings.Label: Jitter Cancellation
Settings.Tooltip: Force add JITTERED_MV flag to init flags. Default (auto) is DLSS value

Settings.Label: Display Resolution
Settings.Tooltip: Force add HIGH_RES_MV flag to init flags. Default (auto) is DLSS value

Settings.Label: Disable Reactive Mask
Settings.Tooltip: Force remove RESPONSIVE_PIXEL_MASK from init flags. Default (auto) is true

Settings.Label: Upscale Ratio Override Enabled
Settings.Tooltip: Set this to true to enable the internal Resolution Override

Settings.Label: Upscale Ratio Override Value
Settings.Tooltip: Set the forced Upscale Ratio value. Default (auto) is 1.3

Settings.Label: Quality Ratio Override Enabled
Settings.Tooltip: Set this to true to enable Custom quality mode overrides

Settings.Label: Quality Ratio DLAA
Settings.Tooltip: Set Custom Upscaling Ratio for DLAA. Default (auto) is 1.0

Settings.Label: Quality Ratio Ultra Quality
Settings.Tooltip: Set Custom Upscaling Ratio for Ultra Quality. Default (auto) is 1.3

Settings.Label: Quality Ratio Quality
Settings.Tooltip: Set Custom Upscaling Ratio for Quality. Default (auto) is 1.5

Settings.Label: Quality Ratio Balanced
Settings.Tooltip: Set Custom Upscaling Ratio for Balanced. Default (auto) is 1.7

Settings.Label: Quality Ratio Performance
Settings.Tooltip: Set Custom Upscaling Ratio for Performance. Default (auto) is 2.0

Settings.Label: Quality Ratio Ultra Performance
Settings.Tooltip: Set Custom Upscaling Ratio for Ultra Performance. Default (auto) is 3.0

Settings.Label: DRS Min Override Enabled
Settings.Tooltip: Set this to true to enable limiting DRS min resolution to Rendering resolution

Settings.Label: DRS Max Override Enabled
Settings.Tooltip: Set this to true to enable limiting DRS max resolution to Rendering resolution

Settings.Label: Force HDR
Settings.Tooltip: Force HDR color space

Settings.Label: Use HDR10
Settings.Tooltip: Use HDR10. DXGI_FORMAT_R10G10B10A2_UNORM instead of DXGI_FORMAT_R16G16B16A16_FLOAT

Settings.Label: Skip Color Space
Settings.Tooltip: Skip setting HDR colorspace

Settings.Label: Override V-Sync
Settings.Tooltip: Enable V-Sync controls

Settings.Label: Force V-Sync
Settings.Tooltip: Force V-Sync value. Default (auto) is none selected

Settings.Label: Sync Interval
Settings.Tooltip: Sync interval value for V-Sync. 0 to 3. Default (auto) is none selected

Settings.Label: Anisotropy Override
Settings.Tooltip: Override max Anisotropy/Anisotropic Filtering for textures. 2, 4, 8, 16. Default (auto) is disabled

Settings.Label: Modify Comparison
Settings.Tooltip: Change comparison filters to Anisotropic ones. Default (auto) is true

Settings.Label: Modify Min Max
Settings.Tooltip: Change min/max filters to Anisotropic ones. Default (auto) is true

Settings.Label: Skip Point Filter
Settings.Tooltip: Skip overriding on point filters. Default (auto) is true

Settings.Label: Mipmap Bias Override
Settings.Tooltip: Override value for Mipmap LOD bias. -15.0 - 15.0. Default (auto) is disabled

Settings.Label: Mipmap Bias Fixed Override
Settings.Tooltip: Use a fixed value for LOD bias. Default (auto) is false

Settings.Label: Mipmap Bias Scale Override
Settings.Tooltip: Use override value as scale multiplier. Default (auto) is false

Settings.Label: Mipmap Bias Override All
Settings.Tooltip: Override all textures LOD bias (normally only overriding < 0 values). Default (auto) is false

Settings.Label: Target Process Name
Settings.Tooltip: Only inject into this specific process (case-insensitive). Example: TargetProcessName=endfield.exe. Default (auto) is disabled (injects into all processes)

Settings.Label: Process Exclusion List
Settings.Tooltip: Don't inject into this specific process (case-insensitive). Process names seperated with pipe "|". Default (auto) is crashpad_handler.exe and others - listed in Config.h under ProcessFilter

Settings.Label: Check For Update
Settings.Tooltip: Enables checking for latest version from Github. Default (auto) is true

Settings.Label: Disable Overlays
Settings.Tooltip: Enables blocking of Steam and Epic overlays. Also blocks Steam Input. Default (auto) is false, except for OptiFG when true

Settings.Label: Don't Create D3D12 Device For Luma
Settings.Tooltip: When using Luma mod and Agility update is enabled, OptiScaler will delay loading of Reshade and create D3D12 device for Luma first. This option will prevent creation of D3D12 device for Luma mod. Default (auto) is false

Settings.Label: Prefer Dedicated GPU
Settings.Tooltip: OptiScaler will try to force High Performance GPU. Default (auto) is false

Settings.Label: Prefer First Dedicated GPU
Settings.Tooltip: OptiScaler will report only first High Performance GPU. Default (auto) is false

Settings.Label: Round Internal Resolution
Settings.Tooltip: Rounds internal resolutions width and height to multiple of this value. 2, 4, 8, 16. Default (auto) is disabled

Settings.Label: Skip First Frames
Settings.Tooltip: Skips upscaling of n frames. n is integer number. Default (auto) is disabled

Settings.Label: Restore Compute Signature
Settings.Tooltip: Restore last used compute signature after upscaling. Default (auto) is false

Settings.Label: Restore Graphic Signature
Settings.Tooltip: Restore last used graphics signature after upscaling. Default (auto) is false

Settings.Label: Use Precompiled Shaders
Settings.Tooltip: Use precompiled shaders for RCAS, Output Scaling and Mask Bias. Default (auto) is true

Settings.Label: Color Resource Barrier
Settings.Tooltip: Color texture resource state to fix for rainbow colors on AMD cards (for mostly UE games). For UE engine games on AMD, set Color to 4 (D3D12_RESOURCE_STATE_RENDER_TARGET)

Settings.Label: Motion Vector Resource Barrier
Settings.Tooltip: For UE engine games on AMD, set MotionVector to 8 (D3D12_RESOURCE_STATE_UNORDERED_ACCESS)

Settings.Label: Depth Resource Barrier
Settings.Tooltip: Depth resource barrier setting

Settings.Label: Color Mask Resource Barrier
Settings.Tooltip: Color mask resource barrier setting

Settings.Label: Exposure Resource Barrier
Settings.Tooltip: Exposure resource barrier setting

Settings.Label: Output Resource Barrier
Settings.Tooltip: Output resource barrier setting
